component.name: Live Session
component.description: **Open:** `Foundation/Border/Default` panel (391×260), **Brand/Accent** 6px top rule, dual shadow, **Active Session** (`Typography/LABEL` + **Foundation/Text/Muted**), PT Serif **24 Bold** white title, centered **70px** mono timer (white, uppercase), collapse control (white chevron). **Minimized:** 359px-wide bar, **16** radius, `1px rgba(255,255,255,0.1)` border, deeper shadow, dot + label stack + **Typography/Body-Bold** title in muted, **Brand/Primary** **Typography/Metric** timer + chevron up.

typography: Typography/Heading-H2 (in code as local PT Serif 24)

codeProps.timerOpen: string; large display in open state
codeProps.timerMinimized: optional; strip timer when minimized (defaults to timerOpen)

notes: 2026-04-08: `LiveSessionCard` from Figma `1287:1545`. Chevrons are inline SVG (white); raster assets not used.
